message:
🌱 Add minio: [resolved] Versioning support mission (#1292)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,76 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "minio-2111-resolved-versioning-support",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "minio: [resolved] Versioning support",
+    "description": "[resolved] Versioning support. This issue affects 9+ users.",
+    "type": "troubleshoot",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify minio troubleshoot symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your minio deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review minio configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant minio configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio\nkubectl get configmap -n minio -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=minio\n```\nWould be great to have [versioning](http://docs.aws.amazon.com/AmazonS3/latest/dev/Versioning.html) support."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [resolved] Versioning support",
+        "description": "> Hi,\n> using 'master' branch where the PR is merged throws always 'Missing Content-MD5 header' error if using 'aws-sdk-java' dependency as they don't include that header when enabling/disabling versioning.\n> \n> I've been checking your addings and I can see that for Minio is required. Usingin minio-client dependency works but I want to know if this feature could be reviewed or not.\n> \n> Thanks in advance\n\nUse it and report issues if you must . We would like community to use it.\n\nNOTE: things\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade minio to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade minio:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade minio minio/minio --namespace minio\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n minio\nhelm list -n minio\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [resolved] Versioning support is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=minio -n minio --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n minio --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "> Hi,\n> using 'master' branch where the PR is merged throws always 'Missing Content-MD5 header' error if using 'aws-sdk-java' dependency as they don't include that header when enabling/disabling versioning.\n> \n> I've been checking your addings and I can see that for Minio is required. Usingin minio-client dependency works but I want to know if this feature could be reviewed or not.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },

+      "minio",
